title: sarat #8295
definition:
1) to incise, scratch, tattoo, cut
    1a) (Qal) to make incision
    1b) (Niphal) to be scratched or lacerated, be cut
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to incise, scratch, tattoo, cut
    1a) (Qal) to make incision
    1b) (Niphal) to be scratched or lacerated, be cut

    NASB:  to incise, scratch
